title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.885 - Determination of eligibility of child, how made
text:
162.885.  Determination of eligibility of child, how made. — The determination of whether a child is eligible for the programs of the special district for the handicapped or severely handicapped shall be made by the special district in accordance with rules and regulations adopted by the state board of education pursuant to section 162.685.
(L. 1973 H.B. 474 § 48) 
Effective 7-1-74
